meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenarios.trigger: React app needs animated page or component transition.
scenarios.orientation: Use lifecycle-safe GSAP patterns, isolate selectors, and provide cleanup/revert behavior.
Segment the story into sections, use pinned areas sparingly, and preserve reading control.
Reduce layout-triggering properties, limit simultaneous targets, and profile before adding complexity.
